title: Second Chance
why_this_song: Second Chance by Shinedown (2008) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Sometimes goodbye is a second chance
Please don't cry one tear for me
Of what I have to say
I made it through the day

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "chance" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "chance" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "tell" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "tell" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:

excerpts.text: I just saw Hayley's comet, she waved
Sometimes goodbye is a second chance

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Shinedown one question about "Second Chance", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Shinedown sobre "Second Chance", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Second Chance" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Second Chance" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Second Chance" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Second Chance" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
